title: Independently verify Obsidian plugin artifact and real GUI smoke

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification of the Obsidian packaging/load fix and real GUI ghost-text/Tab acceptance.
goals: Immediately write an initial in-progress JSON object to reports/orchestration/mvp-2026-05-28/handoffs/MVP-076-verify-obsidian-plugin-smoke.json before running long GUI checks.
Use explicit shell timeouts for every broker, npm, Obsidian, Playwright, or GUI automation command; do not wait indefinitely.
Run npm test --prefix clients and relevant syntax/build checks.

Run a disposable-vault Obsidian GUI smoke with mock provider. Verify the plugin loads without failed-load toast, sends a broker request, displays ghost text, accepts with Tab, and changes the disposable note.
If mock succeeds and it is safe, run one bounded pi-backed Obsidian Markdown request with synthetic content.
Record exact commands, temp paths, screenshots/logs if available, and pass/fail status.
non_goals: Do not publish or install globally.
Do not send repository content to pi.
safety: Use disposable vaults and synthetic notes.
Use strict timeouts for real pi.
success_criteria: If Obsidian mock and bounded pi smoke pass, mark Obsidian GUI acceptance trusted.
If verification fails, include concrete file/line or environment blockers and revive MVP-075 or spawn a focused fix task.
If the local GUI environment prevents a real Obsidian smoke, record the exact blocker and the best available artifact/runtime evidence rather than hanging.
